meaning: adj.绳状的,成粘丝的,肌肉发达的,<英口>质量差的
examples: We spent the night in a ropy old tent.
Few realised just how ropy the Banks were.
By late 2005, this battle had pushed rates for ropy borrowers down to a little over 7%.
Fibrocystic breasts are composed of tissue that feels ropy, lumpy or bumpy in texture.
In any event, putting in fresh capital may now be more pressing than pulling out ropy assets.
